title: Lepro LED Desk Lamp for Home Office, 9.5W 750LM Metal Touch Control Desk Light, 5 Color Modes 5 Brightness Level, Eye Caring Task Lamp For Reading, Sewing, Crafts, School Supplies, Puzzle Light, Black
description: Compact metal desk lamp with 5 color temperatures, 5 brightness levels, eye-care diffused lighting, and memory function for home office and reading.
targetKeyword: best LED desk lamp for home office
bullets: Multiple Lighting Choices. This led desktop lamp offers 5 lighting modes that can each be paired with one of the 5 brightness levels for a total of 25 different light settings.

Eye Care Diffused Non-Flickering Lighting. With frosted shade and a long lamp head, it cast a broader span of soft light, efficiently reduce the contrast between your monitor and the surrounding area, creating a more comfortable environment for your eyes.
Sleek and Minimalist. It won't hog space on your desk, fits nicely in any desk, work bench, sewing table, bedside nightstands, nail station etc.
Energy Saving LED Lamp No Heat Up. Reduce the electricity bill by 75% and do not overheat like other traditional lights. Keep your workspace cool and comfortable.
Fully Adjustable Angle. Flexible to bend the main body of the lamp and the top light bar. You can focus the light exactly where you need it.
verifiedFacts: 5 brightness levels paired with color modes for 25 total light settings
Touch control on the lamp base
Memory function restores the last-used brightness and color settings when powered back on
Eye-care diffused non-flickering light with frosted shade and long lamp head
Metal base with aluminum and plastic construction; compact minimalist desk footprint
Fully adjustable lamp body and light bar angle
Corded electric design with 100-240V input and 12V working voltage
Amazon rating 4.8 out of 5 from 8,011+ customer reviews
Ranked #5 in Desk Lamps on Amazon US
No smart app or Wi-Fi control — adjustments are touch-only
